name: io.github.stagproject/uspto-structured-patent-marketplace
description: Autonomous A2A patent data marketplace (USPTO/EPO) providing AI-optimized structured JSON. Continuously updated daily. Exclusively covers high-demand tech sectors: Physics & Computing (G01 Sensors, G06 AI/ML, G16 Health Informatics) and Electricity & Communications (H01 Semiconductors/Solid-State, H04 5G/6G, H10 Advanced Memory). Includes AI-enriched insights (biz_value_prop, attr_tech_stack). Supports instant on-chain M2M crypto transactions (Base/Polygon USDC, Oasis ROSE) for autonomous agents.
